title: CBRN Laboratory Intelligence Atlas
classification_note: Internal analytical tool. Dataset aggregates open-source institutional information and structured expert scoring fields. Not for public release without sanitization and source review.
methodology: Weighted benchmark model with explicit criterion-level justification and profile-level supporting data for each lab.
validation_tiers: Tier 3 candidate - structured placeholder pending validation
v3_changes: Each lab profile includes seven criterion sections with score, weight, justification, and supporting data
Real open-source map layer added using Leaflet and OpenStreetMap tiles with offline fallback notice
Lab-card results paginated at 10 cards per page
map_source: Leaflet open-source JavaScript library with OpenStreetMap open map tiles. Internal deployments may mirror/cache tiles if internet access is restricted.
